title: Yijing Hexagram 61: Zhong Fu (Inner Truth)
description: Hexagram 61 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 61 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Inner Truth. Pigs and fishes. Good fortune. It furthers one to cross the great water.
